titles.en: Chapter 39 – The loan, it supports the Zakāt
Chapter 39 – The loan, it supports the Zakāt

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ قَرْضُ الْمُؤْمِنِ غَنِيمَةٌ وَ تَعْجِيلُ أَجْرٍ إِنْ أَيْسَرَ قَضَاكَ وَ إِنْ مَاتَ قَبْلَ ذَلِكَ احْتَسَبْتَ بِهِ مِنَ الزَّكَاةِ .
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ قَرْضُ الْمُؤْمِنِ غَنِيمَةٌ وَ تَعْجِيلُ أَجْرٍ إِنْ أَيْسَرَ قَضَاكَ وَ إِنْ مَاتَ قَبْلَ ذَلِكَ احْتَسَبْتَ بِهِ مِنَ الزَّكَاةِ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal and Al Hajjal, from Sa’alba Bin Maymoun, from Ibrahim Bin Al Sindy, from Yunus Bin Ammar who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘A loan of the Believer is a booty, and it hastens the Recompense. If he (borrower) is affluent, he would fulfil it, and if he were to die before that, it would be Reckoned with him (the lender) as being from the Zakāt’.
en.hubeali.text: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal and Al Hajjal, from Sa’alba Bin Maymoun, from Ibrahim Bin Al Sindy, from Yunus Bin Ammar who said, ‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘A loan of the Believer is a booty, and it hastens the Recompense. If he (borrower) is affluent, he would fulfil it, and if he were to die before that, it would be Reckoned with him (the lender) as being from the Zakāt’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal and al-Hajjal from Tha’labah ibn Maymun from Ibrahim al-Sindiy from Yunus ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once heard abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ’Lending a loan to a believer is a great gain which hastens reward. If he earns, he pays you back; but if he dies before paying, you can count it as payment of Zakat.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal and al-Hajjal from Tha’labah ibn Maymun from Ibrahim al-Sindiy from Yunus ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once heard abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ’Lending a loan to a believer is a great gain which hastens reward. If he earns, he pays you back; but if he dies before paying, you can count it as payment of Zakat.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/104)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/104)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ وَ الْحَجَّالِ عَنْ ثَعْلَبَةَ بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ السِّنْدِيِّ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 39 – The loan, it supports the Zakāt

segments: كَانَ عَلِيٌّ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ يَقُولُ قَرْضُ الْمَالِ حِمَى الزَّكَاةِ .
arabic.text: كَانَ عَلِيٌّ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ يَقُولُ قَرْضُ الْمَالِ حِمَى الزَّكَاةِ .

segments: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Muhammad Bin Fuzayl, from Musa Bin Bakr,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassanasws having said: ‘Aliasws was saying: ‘Lending the wealth supports the Zakāt’.
en.hubeali.text: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Muhammad Bin Fuzayl, from Musa Bin Bakr, (It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassanasws having said: ‘Aliasws was saying: ‘Lending the wealth supports the Zakāt’.

segments: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from Muhammad ibn Fudayl from Musa ibn Bakr who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say, ’Lending a loan is protection for Zakat.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from Muhammad ibn Fudayl from Musa ibn Bakr who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say, ’Lending a loan is protection for Zakat.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/104)
gradings.label: موثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/104)

narratorChain.raw: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ فُضَيْلٍ عَنْ مُوسَى بْنِ بَكْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 39 – The loan, it supports the Zakāt

segments: مَنْ أَقْرَضَ رَجُلًا قَرْضاً إِلَى مَيْسَرَةٍ كَانَ مَالُهُ فِي زَكَاةٍ وَ كَانَ هُوَ فِي الصَّلَاةِ مَعَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ حَتَّى يَقْضِيَهُ .
arabic.text: مَنْ أَقْرَضَ رَجُلًا قَرْضاً إِلَى مَيْسَرَةٍ كَانَ مَالُهُ فِي زَكَاةٍ وَ كَانَ هُوَ فِي الصَّلَاةِ مَعَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ حَتَّى يَقْضِيَهُ .

segments: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from his father, from Ahmad Bin Al Nazar, from Amro Bin Shimr, from Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘The one who lends a loan to a man up to the time he becomes affluent, his (lender’s) wealth would be in Zakāt, he would be in the Salāt along with the Angels until he (the borrower) fulfils it (pays back the loan)’.
en.hubeali.text: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from his father, from Ahmad Bin Al Nazar, from Amro Bin Shimr, from Jabir, (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘The one who lends a loan to a man up to the time he becomes affluent, his (lender’s) wealth would be in Zakāt, he would be in the Salāt along with the Angels until he (the borrower) fulfils it (pays back the loan)’.

segments: 3. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from his father from Ahmad ibn al-Nadr from ‘Amr ibn Shimr from Jabir who has said the following: “If one lends a loan to a man until he becomes able to pay back, his (lender’s) money is in Zakat and he is in Salah (prayer) with the angels until the loan is paid back.’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from his father from Ahmad ibn al-Nadr from ‘Amr ibn Shimr from Jabir who has said the following: “If one lends a loan to a man until he becomes able to pay back, his (lender’s) money is in Zakat and he is in Salah (prayer) with the angels until the loan is paid back.’”

narratorChain.raw: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ النَّضْرِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
